hero.label: About Us
hero.title: We are Invoicemonk in every sense of it.
hero.description: This is why we built straightforward tools that empower freelancers and small business owners to take full control of the way they work.

story.paragraph1: A thing about us at Invoicemonk, we believe the freelancers and small businesses are the heart of our communities, and championing them is worth fighting for because it will lead to more new entrepreneurs, and more thriving small businesses.
story.paragraph2prefix: How we intend to achieve that is by providing a
story.invoiceLink: simple & easy to use invoice application
story.paragraph2suffix: and a financial management solution they can't live without. We also have
story.blogLink: a blog to teach, educate and guide freelancers and small business owners

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.text: To enable freelancers and businesses throughout the world to do what they love doing without headaches and time wasting.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.text: To be Nigeria's Number One Indigenous Business Enabler Partner with IT Solutions.

press.label: Press & Media
press.title: As Featured In
press.description: Invoicemonk has been recognized for helping small businesses and freelancers streamline their invoicing and financial management.

team.label: Our Team
team.title: Meet the Founders
team.description: The passionate team behind Invoicemonk, dedicated to empowering freelancers and small businesses across the world.

openRoles.title: Open Roles
openRoles.description: Are you interested in joining our team? We're always looking for passionate individuals to help us build the future of business tools.

whoFounded.question: Who founded Invoicemonk?
whoFounded.answer: Invoicemonk was co-founded by Olayinka Olayokun (CEO) and Joan Omionawele (Communication President), with a mission to empower freelancers and small businesses worldwide.

mission.question: What is Invoicemonk's mission?
mission.answer: Our mission is to champion freelancers and small businesses by providing simple, easy-to-use invoicing and financial management tools that help them thrive.

availability.question: Where is Invoicemonk available?
availability.answer: Invoicemonk is available globally and serves businesses in over 50 countries. Our platform supports multiple currencies and regional compliance requirements.
